testcase.name: test_bulk_delete_contacts
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v20.py:61: in test_bulk_delete_contacts assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Bulk delete failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Bulk delete failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","entity_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"list_type","loc":["body"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{"entity_type":"contact","entity_ids":["contact_f4c883b3b6dd","contact_548c9a6f27d3"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/list_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_delete_leads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v20.py:82: in test_bulk_delete_leads assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Bulk delete failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Bulk delete failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","entity_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"list_type","loc":["body"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{"entity_type":"lead","entity_ids":["lead_55128cdf4762","lead_b8bfd8d88cb5"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/list_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_delete_invalid_type
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v20.py:92: in test_bulk_delete_invalid_type assert resp.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_update_leads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v20.py:117: in test_bulk_update_leads assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Bulk update failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Bulk update failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","entity_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_add_leads_to_campaign
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features_v20.py:173: in test_bulk_add_leads_to_campaign assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Bulk add to campaign failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Bulk add to campaign failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","campaign_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["query","entity_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"list_type","loc":["body"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{"campaign_id":"campaign_f11698321dd7","entity_type":"lead","entity_ids":["lead_8d5f23df58a3","lead_c0fd659212f6"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/list_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
